sql_array: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, secret_key VARCHAR(64), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_login DATETIME NULL);
SELECT UPPER(TOTP_generate(stringdate('1970-01-01Z'), stringdate('2603-10-11 11:33:20Z'), 30, 8, secret_key, 'hmac-sha256')) AS totp FROM users WHERE secret_key IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE log (user_id INT, action VARCHAR(255), action_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO log (user_id, action) VALUES (1, 'login'), (1, 'attempted login with incorrect password');
SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS attempts FROM log GROUP BY user_id HAVING attempts > 1;
SELECT user_id, TOTP_generate(stringdate('1970-01-01Z'), STRINGDATE('2603-10-11 11:33:20Z'), 30, 8, secret_key, 'hmac-sha256') AS generated_totp FROM users WHERE generated_totp REGEXP '^[0-9]{6}$';

SELECT user_id FROM log WHERE user_id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE TOTP_generate(stringdate('1970-01-01Z'), stringdate('2603-10-11 11:33:20Z'), 30, 8, secret_key, 'hmac-sha256') REGEXP '^[0-9]{6}$');
CREATE TABLE temp_data (data_value VARCHAR(50) CHECK (data_value != ''), creation_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT data_value FROM temp_data WHERE data_value IS NULL OR TOTP_generate(stringdate('1970-01-01Z'), stringdate('2603-10-11 11:33:20Z'), 30, 8, 'sample_key', 'hmac-sha256') REGEXP '^.*$';
SELECT user_id FROM users WHERE secret_key LIKE '%k2%' AND id IN (SELECT user_id FROM log WHERE action_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY');
